---
title: "TOC for MI-AGI comparison"
author: "Emily Nazario | UC Santa Cruz | enazario'@'ucsc.edu"
format: html
editor: visual
---

[See here](sim_compare.html) for the simulated environmental data visualizations.

[See here](sim_compare_mbar.html) for the same comparisons but following the AGI equation from Morée et al. 2025.
